mapper.select: SELECT id, plate_number, region_name, entry_time, exit_time, fee, status, create_time, update_time FROM parking_record
SELECT id, plate_number, region_name, entry_time, exit_time, fee, status, create_time, update_time FROM parking_record WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE parking_record SET plate_number = #{plateNumber}, region_name = #{regionName}, entry_time = #{entryTime}, exit_time = #{exitTime}, fee = #{fee}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, plate_number, region_name, entry_time, exit_time, fee, status, create_time, update_time FROM parking_record
AND plate_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{plateNumber}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
